groupings.title: CTO toolkit
groupings.description: Evaluate and steer an engineering org straight from the repo: orient on an unfamiliar codebase, audit it deeply, assess the team's delivery process, run recurring risk passes, quantify a recurring bug pattern, support an investment or acquisition decision, and track trajectory over time.

groupings.title: Productivity
groupings.description: Everyday workflow helpers that make working with AI faster — starting with turning a fuzzy intent into a sharp, reusable prompt.

groupings.title: Coding
groupings.description: Skills the coding agent reaches for while working — getting a second opinion from another agent when it's stuck or weighing competing technical approaches, and getting a second-opinion code review of work it's written.

groupings.title: Delivery pipeline
groupings.description: Turn a plan into a live GitHub backlog and drive it to done: file complexity/priority-tagged tickets from a spec+plan, execute them with concurrent workers through review and CI, and supervise the epic end-to-end to a mergeable PR.

groupings.title: DevOps
groupings.description: Skills for provisioning and wiring up development infrastructure — isolated per-workspace environments, database branching, and the project setup that makes parallel agents safe.
